LanguageData.Zombie.label: 丧尸
LanguageData.Zombie.tools.0.label: 咬
LanguageData.Zombie.tools.1.label: 左拳
LanguageData.Zombie.tools.2.label: 右拳
LanguageData.ElectricalField.label: 电场
LanguageData.ElectricalField.verbs.0.label: 冲击
LanguageData.ElectricalField.tools.0.label: 冲击
LanguageData.ZombieSpitter.label: 僵尸喷吐者
LanguageData.ZombieSpitter.description: 从空中喷出僵尸攻击你的基地的怪物。
